source_name: DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics — renewable share of generation

fields.renewable_definition: Hydro + wind + solar (utility + rooftop) + bioenergy. DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics publishes this as the headline renewable-electricity share. Distinct from the Renewable Energy Target accounting basis.
fields.scope: Whole-of-Australia electricity generation, all networks plus behind-the-meter.
fields.primary_source_document: DCCEEW Australian Energy Update — figure 'Renewable share of electricity generation' and Table O underlying data.
fields.keying_plan: Key the headline % for the most recent fiscal year. Optionally key the trailing 5-year series so the page can show trend. Annual lag of ~12 months.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed renewable share % from DCCEEW Australian Energy Update headline figure. Australia's renewable share has been rising rapidly (>30% by mid-2020s); cite the exact year keyed.
